title: Mega Style Overhaul — Holiday Presets, New Particles, Shape-Adaptive Rings & Live Appearance Profile
summary: v1.0.0.31 is the largest cosmetic update yet. Adds 7 holiday/seasonal ring types (Halloween, Xmas, Valentine, Easter, Ocean, Galaxy, Lightning), 5 new particle effect types (heart ❤️, confetti 🎊, meteor 🌠, cherry 🌸, ghost 👻), 6 holiday bubble presets, 6 chat background presets, 7 holiday personal themes (Halloween → Galaxy), fixes shape-adaptive ring rendering so hexagon/diamond/squircle rings follow the avatar shape, and enhances the profile panel to load and display a user's live style settings (ring, name color, bubble theme, geometry).

changes.description: av-ring-wrap::before now uses CSS custom properties `--ring-r` (border-radius) and `--ring-cp` (clip-path) instead of hardcoded 50%. Combined with _applyProfileDecorations propagating these vars to the parent av-ring-wrap and member-ring-wrap, all conic-gradient ring animations now match the avatar shape — hexagon ring looks like a hexagon, diamond ring like a diamond, etc.

After applying geometry to the image element, the function now finds the parent av-ring-wrap or member-ring-wrap and sets --ring-r / --ring-cp CSS custom properties so the ::before ring animation tracks the avatar shape exactly. Also clears those vars in the reset path.

Added: 🎃 Halloween (orange/purple/black conic), 🎄 Xmas (red/green/gold), 💕 Love/Valentine (pink/rose gradient), 🐣 Easter (pastel rainbow conic), 🌊 Ocean (blue/cyan), 🌌 Galaxy (deep purple/indigo, blur), ⚡ Lightning (white/electric-blue fast 0.8s). Each type includes ::before conic-gradient rule (av-ring-wrap, member-ring-wrap), msg-avatar-circle border/animation, ring-card-av picker preview, and profile-header-img rule. Seven new keyframe animations: av-halloween-ring, av-xmas-ring, av-valentine-ring, av-easter-ring, av-ocean-ring, av-galaxy-ring, av-lightning-ring.

PARTICLE_TYPES extended: 'heart' (bezier heart path, falls like snow, pink tint), 'confetti' (rotating coloured rectangles with per-particle random hue, falls), 'meteor' (gradient streak shoots diagonally fast across canvas, wraps from left), 'cherry' (soft rotating ellipse petals, slow fall), 'ghost' (renders 👻 emoji via fillText). _makeParticle now initialises rot and hue fields; meteor starts at x=-20 and uses fast diagonal velocity. _tickParticles adds rotation update (p.rot) each frame and five new canvas draw branches.
Added to STYLE_BUBBLE_PRESETS: 🎃 Halloween (orange→purple), 🎄 Xmas (red→green), 💕 Love (pink→rose), 🐣 Easter (lavender→cyan), 🌊 Ocean (blue→teal), 🌌 Galaxy (dark purple→violet).

Added to STYLE_CHAT_BG_PRESETS: 🎃 Halloween (dark orange-black), 🎄 Xmas (dark red-green), 💕 Valentine (deep rose), 🐣 Easter (twilight pastel), ☀️ Summer (warm dusk-navy), 🌌 Galaxy (near-black deep purple).

Added to STYLE_PERSONAL_THEMES: 🎃 Halloween (orange name, halloween ring, halloween bubbles/bg), 🎄 Christmas (red name, xmas ring), 💕 Valentine (pink name, valentine ring), 🐣 Easter (lavender name, easter ring), 🎆 New Year (gold name, gold ring), ☀️ Summer (orange name, ocean ring), 🌌 Galaxy (violet name, galaxy ring). All 7 themes have matching bubbleId and chatBgId for instant full-look presets.

openUserProfileScreen now fetches appearance.json in parallel with profile.json. The avatar is rendered inside an av-ring-wrap with the user's actual ring class — full conic-gradient and glow ring animations appear live in the panel. The display name is colored with the user's nameColor. A new '✨ Style' row shows appearance chips (ring name, name color, bubble preset, personal theme, avatar shape) when set. All 7 new rings work in the profile panel without extra CSS.

All 7 new holiday ring types (halloween, xmas, valentine, easter, ocean, galaxy, lightning) added to member-ring-wrap::before + member-ring-wrap>.member-avatar selector pairs so they display correctly in the members/roommates panel.
